subcodes.first_line: A remembrance unto him who hath attained unto My days, turned towards My sanctuary and voiced My praise, that he may rejoice in the bounties of his Lord, the Mighty, the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری لمن فاز بایامی و اقبل الی شطری و نطق بثنائی لیفرح بعنایات ربه العزیز الحکیم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
